data.name: Stepmom Who Fell on a Hike
data.detailed_description:
Stepmom Who Fell on a Hike is a choice-driven psychological drama visual novel exploring fragile relationships, emotional betrayal, and the consequences of hesitation. Step into the shoes of a timid college student whose quiet life spirals into emotional chaos during what was meant to be a simple hiking trip.

The visual novel opens with the protagonist, a young man living with his father and new stepmother, Sandra. Despite his comfortable home life, the protagonist finds himself increasingly drawn to his college classmate, Emily. Their playful flirting in class has left him with a growing attraction, but he's too shy to express his feelings.

One sunny afternoon, Emily surprises him with an invitation to go on a hike. Eager to spend time with her but also feeling a bit nervous, the protagonist decides to invite Sandra along, hoping her presence will ease any potential awkwardness. As they venture into the woods, the dynamic between the three shifts unexpectedly. Emily and Sandra, both captivating in their own ways, begin to vie for the protagonist's attention, each trying to outdo the other with witty banter and playful teases.

The tension between them reaches a fever pitch when they spot a lone hiker on a nearby trail. Jake, a tall and muscular figure, catches their eye, and almost instantly, the focus shifts from the protagonist to this new, intriguing stranger. Sandra, who's been feeling neglected at home, is the first to fall under Jake's charm. Unbeknownst to them, the protagonist and Emily watch from a distance as Sandra is seduced, her inhibitions melting away in the heat of the moment.

Emily, driven by a mix of curiosity and excitement, decides to join in, offering herself to Jake with a boldness that surprises everyone, including the protagonist. Jake, with a confidence that borders on arrogance, takes Emily without hesitation, his actions blatantly disregarding Sandra's feelings. The scene unfolds in a raw and intense manner, leaving the protagonist and Sandra both shocked and embarrassed.

In the aftermath, Sandra approaches the protagonist, apologizing for her actions and urging him not to blame himself for Emily's choices. Despite the tension and discomfort, they find themselves forced to work together as they realize they've lost their way. The once picturesque hike turns into a survival ordeal, with the threat of danger looming over them.

As they struggle to find their way back, they encounter Jake again, and this time, the three women find themselves in a threesome, driven by a mix of desperation and curiosity. The protagonist, torn between his loyalty to Sandra and his feelings for Emily, must navigate this unexpected and intense situation, all while trying to survive the harsh realities of the wilderness.

  • animated sex scenes

  • choices

  • multiple endings

data.short_description: A shy protagonist, living with his stepmother, Sandra, is torn between his feelings for classmate Emily and his stepmother's sudden attraction to a muscular hiker, Jake. Sandra falls, followed by Emily. The protagonist, watching in shock, must navigate their complex dynamics as they get lost.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

  • OS *: Windows 7 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

  • OS: 10.10+
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
